title: justicia inficiens
intro: Justicia inficiens, commonly known as False Madder, is a plant species native to tropical regions of Central and South America, belonging to the Acanthaceae family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. Its health benefits include treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne, reducing fever, and alleviating pain. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used in traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
